results.title: U.S. Women's Open amateurs: Kiara Romero, Maria Jose Marin finish inside top 10 at Riv
results.description: Amateurs Kiara Romero and Maria Jose Marin each carded 68s this week at Riviera Country Club that fueled their respective top-10 finishes.
